_note: Planning artifact, not implementable. Each AC is a 'manual' verifier whose 'steps' point the reader at a specific PRD section to confirm structural completeness. The 'roadmap_hints' object below is a forward-looking map (one entry per PRD section 6 roadmap item) that subsequent feature bundles will cite when scaffolded; the coverage gate ignores keys it does not know.

steps: Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 2 'Current capability inventory'.
Confirm a table exists for each of the 7 domains: Transcription, Editing, Captions, Export/FFmpeg pipeline, Project/persistence, UX/shell, Build & ops.
Confirm at least 30 capability rows in total across all 7 tables.
Confirm every row has a 'Source of truth' file path.
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 3 'Undocumented or under-documented capabilities'.
Confirm at least 10 numbered items.
Confirm each item cites at least one file path (line number where useful).
Spot-check by opening one of the cited files and confirming the named symbol exists.
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 4 'Gap analysis to v1.0 launch'.
Confirm three subsections exist: Blockers, Strongly Recommended, Nice-to-have.
Confirm every gap has a stable ID matching the prefix of its subsection (B#, SR#, NH#).
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 5 'FFmpeg opportunity map'.

Confirm the table covers all 12 focus areas listed in the original brief: loudness normalization, per-clip / crossfades, burn-in caption parity, format/container choices, hardware encoder selection, aspect-ratio reframe, speed/pitch-preserving time stretch, per-segment volume / ducking, chapter markers, thumbnail / poster frame, subtitle sidecar export including ASS, loudness / clipping warnings (ebur128 panel).
Confirm each row has Value, Complexity (S/M/L), UX risk (Low/Med/High), and Recommend (Include/Defer/Reject) columns filled in.
Confirm no row recommends a network-dependent capability.
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 6 'Proposed roadmap to v1.0'.
Confirm exactly 3 milestones: Foundation, Polish, Launch-Ready.
Confirm each milestone has: a 'Closes' line citing §4 IDs, an 'Includes FFmpeg' line citing §5 IDs, an ordered table of slugs, and an 'Exit criteria' bullet list.
Confirm slug ordering matches dependency order described in the BLUEPRINT methodology.
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 7 'Anti-scope (explicitly NOT for v1.0)'.
Confirm at least 6 numbered exclusions (AS#).
Confirm each exclusion cites a file:line in AGENTS.md or PRD.md as justification.
Spot-check one citation by opening AGENTS.md at the cited line and confirming the rule is stated there.
Open features/product-map-v1/PRD.md.
Locate Section 8 'Risks & open questions for the human'.
Confirm at least 8 numbered questions (Q1...Q8 or higher).
Confirm each is phrased as a binary or short-list decision (not open-ended).
Open features/product-map-v1/coverage.json.
Locate the 'roadmap_hints' object below.
Confirm it contains one key per roadmap item in PRD.md §6 (1.1-1.5, 2.1-2.7, 3.1-3.6).
Confirm each entry names a verifier kind (skill / agent / cargo-test / script / manual) and verifier name.
Confirm any 'to-be-created' verifier is explicitly labelled as such.

1.1-unreachable-surface-purge.note: Plus dep-hygiene for any orphan modules deleted; manual live-app QC for sidebar reachability.

1.2-caption-settings-handlers.note: Plus existing audio-boundary-eval skill to verify caption preview/export parity unchanged.

1.3-loudness-preflight.note: Existing tests in src-tauri/src/managers/splice/loudness.rs cover deterministic LUFS; add live-app manual step for the preflight UI.

1.4-audio-only-export.note: Extend with audio-only export presets; transcript-precision-eval skill already covers content invariants.

1.5-caption-parity-eval.note: Extend with new preview-vs-burn-in geometry assertion. To-be-extended; script exists.

2.1-export-format-mov.note: Boundary eval re-runs against new container; to-be-extended with mov fixture.

2.2-hardware-encoder-fallback.note: Hardware-dependent; CI smoke = CPU fallback path. Manual GPU verification per platform.

2.3-time-stretch-segments.note: Time-mapping change requires drift-fuzzer + transcript-precision-eval skill.

2.4-chapter-markers.note: New cargo-test module under managers/export or managers/captions.

2.5-ass-sidecar-export.note: Plus a new fixture-based round-trip test for the .ass file.

2.6-keyboard-shortcuts-cheatsheet.note: Pure UI surface; manual reachability + i18n-pruning for any new strings.

2.7-restore-or-delete-post-processing-ui.note: If deletion path: dep-hygiene + i18n-pruning. If restore path: manual + transcript-precision-eval to confirm cleanup pipeline still passes.

3.1-windows-code-signing.note: Verifier is hands-on on a clean Windows VM; no automated equivalent without infrastructure investment.

3.2-macos-build-verify.note: Restores docs/build-macos.md; verifier is hands-on per AGENTS.md 'Verified means the live app'.

3.3-linux-build-verify.note: Includes Nix flake verification; hands-on per platform.

3.4-readme-launch-pass.note: Plus manual review against AGENTS.md to ensure README does not duplicate canonical rules.

3.5-poster-frame-export.note: Single FFmpeg invocation; deterministic output size + format check.

3.6-first-run-smoke-eval.note: New cross-platform script; gates Milestone 3 exit.
